proposal.title: Q2 content steward selection
proposal.description: Rank candidates for the Q2 2026 content steward role. The steward curates and reviews community-submitted learning content.

options.label: Miriam Chen
options.description: 3 years as contributor, specializes in distributed systems content
options.sourceJustification: Nominated based on contribution history and peer endorsements

options.label: James Okafor
options.description: 2 years as contributor, led facilitation skills path development

options.label: Priya Sharma
options.description: 1 year as contributor, expertise in cooperative economics and governance
options.sourceJustification: Nominated by 4 community members for governance knowledge
